contracts.note: PLTR call buyers are aggressively lifting offers on a short-dated, 8.6% out-of-the-money strike, with today's volume already 8x prior open interest and an additional 4800 contracts added this hour. The $2.3M premium and 60% implied volatility suggest a tactical bet on a significant move higher within the next week, rather than longer-term positioning.

The 7% out-of-the-money strike with only 6 days to expiration and a $1.3M premium suggests a tactical, high-conviction bet against the stock's near-term upside, especially given the 59% implied volatility.
